columns.description: America/New_York date derived from source_status_observed_at_utc; complete and not-found outcomes are partitioned by when they were actually observed.
columns.name: source_observed_date

columns.description: Fixed composite_figi for every formal authoritative request.
columns.name: requested_identifier_type

columns.description: Exact case-sensitive Composite FIGI from the immutable formal receipt.
columns.name: requested_identifier

columns.description: Fixed ticker_change copied from the formal request parameters.
columns.name: requested_event_type

columns.description: Local request identity start label; it was not sent as a server-side ticker-events date filter.
columns.name: request_start_label

columns.description: Local request identity end label; events outside this label remain valid source evidence.
columns.name: request_end_label

columns.description: Fixed local_request_identity_not_server_date_filter_v1 marker.
columns.name: request_window_semantics

columns.description: Exact Bronze manifest status: complete for returned timelines or failed for terminal HTTP-404 observations.
columns.name: source_manifest_status

columns.description: Deterministic domain complete_timeline or not_found_404; not_found is endpoint coverage status, never asset absence.
columns.name: request_outcome

columns.description: Provider HTTP status preserved when the failed manifest recorded it; exactly 404 for not_found_404 and null for complete timelines because successful HTTP status was not stored.
columns.name: provider_status_code

columns.description: Provider results.name for complete timelines; null for not_found_404.
columns.name: response_name

columns.description: Optional provider results.cik for complete timelines; null is allowed and never backfilled.
columns.name: response_cik

columns.description: Provider results.composite_figi for complete timelines and null for not_found_404; complete values must equal requested_identifier.
columns.name: response_composite_figi

columns.description: Number of manifest-bound raw results.events occurrences; zero for not_found_404.
columns.name: raw_event_count

columns.description: Number of this request's event occurrences entering ticker_change_event DATA.
columns.name: accepted_event_count

columns.description: Number of this request's event occurrences represented by quarantine records, including blank target placeholders.
columns.name: quarantined_event_count

columns.description: Bronze manifest created_at timestamp for the exact request.
columns.name: source_manifest_created_at_utc

columns.description: Manifest completed_at for complete timelines or final failed-manifest updated_at for the observed HTTP-404 outcome.
columns.name: source_status_observed_at_utc

columns.description: First XNYS session whose open is strictly after source_status_observed_at_utc.
columns.name: source_available_session

columns.description: XNYS open timestamp for source_available_session.
columns.name: source_available_at_utc

columns.description: Fixed first_xnys_open_after_source_observation_v1 rule.
columns.name: source_availability_rule

columns.description: Fixed current_endpoint_observation_without_historical_vintage_v1 marker; a 404 is not timeless and a complete timeline is not an archived vintage.
columns.name: source_availability_quality

columns.description: Deterministic domain timeline_returned or endpoint_identifier_not_found; neither value changes daily Assets universe membership.
columns.name: coverage_interpretation

columns.description: Fixed evidence_only_pending_s7 marker.
columns.name: identity_evidence_scope

columns.description: Always false in S5 regardless of request outcome.
columns.name: backtest_identity_eligible

columns.description: Canonical SHA-256 local request ID; the frozen primary key and exact link to event rows.
columns.name: source_request_id

columns.description: Server-assigned request ID for complete response envelopes; null for not_found_404 because no successful payload was stored.
columns.name: source_provider_request_id

columns.description: SHA-256 of the exact formal Bronze manifest observed by this row.
columns.name: source_manifest_sha256

columns.description: SHA-256 of the one reviewed complete response artifact; null for not_found_404.
columns.name: source_artifact_sha256

columns.description: Reviewed manifest artifact count: one for current complete timelines and zero for not_found_404.
columns.name: source_page_count

description: One formal Massive ticker-events request outcome per authoritative Composite FIGI, preserving complete timelines and stable HTTP-404 endpoint coverage as normal status data with conservative observation availability and no daily-universe or backtest implication.
grain: One exact formal authoritative ticker_events request/manifest identified by source_request_id, including both complete_timeline and not_found_404 outcomes; pilot manifests never enter.

qa_rules.description: Every output Parquet field, order, Arrow type, and nullability must equal this contract.
The immutable 15,173-row formal Composite-FIGI receipt and exact request definitions must reconcile with no missing, extra, duplicate, or pilot request.
Every formal manifest must pass strict JSON, identity, timestamp, status, artifact, and checksum validation appropriate to its complete or HTTP-404 outcome.
Every status row must reproduce one exact formal Composite-FIGI request with types=ticker_change and the frozen local start/end labels.
The frozen formal scope must contain exactly 15,173 unique source_request_id rows.
Formal status rows must reconcile exactly to complete_timeline plus not_found_404 outcomes with no third status.
Every row must use the exact complete_timeline or not_found_404 outcome and matching source manifest status.
Every complete_timeline row must have one valid artifact, response identity/envelope evidence, and event counts that reconcile.
Every not_found_404 row must be a failed formal manifest with provider_status_code=404, no artifacts, and zero event counts; no other failure is admitted.
Every complete response Composite FIGI must equal its requested formal Composite FIGI; not-found rows must not invent response identity.
Response, provider status, artifact, provider-request-ID, page-count, and count nullability must match request_outcome exactly.
For every request, raw_event_count must equal accepted_event_count plus quarantined_event_count, and the totals must reconcile to ticker_change_event and quarantine outputs.
The output must contain no duplicate source_request_id.
Every status row must reproduce the formal request ID, exact manifest hash, observed timestamps, and outcome-dependent artifact identity.
Observed-date/time and operational availability must follow the frozen calendar and first-XNYS-open-strictly-after-observation rule.
Every row must retain the exact local_request_identity_not_server_date_filter_v1 marker.
Coverage interpretation must match request outcome and must never classify a 404 as asset, event, or daily-universe absence.
Every row must retain the exact evidence_only_pending_s7 marker.
No S5 request-status row may be marked backtest identity eligible.
Every formal request must contribute exactly one status DATA row; no 404 is dropped or quarantined.
Every accepted or quarantined formal event occurrence must link to exactly one complete_timeline status parent.
No isolated pilot manifest may enter the formal request-status table or its coverage denominator.
Formal Composite FIGIs returning stable HTTP 404 remain explicit endpoint-coverage statuses and do not reduce the daily Assets universe.
Complete responses without CIK remain explicit and are not filled from another source.
Pilot manifests observed beside formal data are counted as excluded source evidence and must contribute zero production rows.
Any formal identifier whose outcome changes relative to a prior approved capture is retained as a new version and surfaced for review.
Formal manifests or complete response objects containing fields outside the reviewed mapping require schema review before publication.
